title: Sprint Toggle SXD
description: Its a Mods that Sprint you without holding ctrl and it default keybind assign as R .You can set the keybind in the keybind option in setting
body:
It is an Mod that allow you to sprint without even holding ctrl button on keyboard and very useful for new player

**_How to Setup_**

Default Keybind is R
Go to Option,Controls,Keybind,search Sprint Toggle set as Keybind as your choice

load any world press and keybind then press w it will automatically sprint for you
